title: The New Stack | DevOps, Open Source, and Cloud Native News
content:
We’re so glad you’re here. You can expect all the best TNS content to arrive 
									Monday through Friday to keep you on top of the news and at the top of your game.
Check your inbox for a confirmation email where you can adjust your preferences 
									and even join additional groups.
Follow TNS on your favorite social media networks.
Become a TNS follower on LinkedIn.
Check out the latest featured and trending stories while you wait for your 
									first TNS newsletter.
Community created roadmaps, articles, resources and journeys for 
					developers to help you choose your path and grow in your career.

metadata.description: The latest news and resources on cloud native technologies, distributed systems and data architectures with emphasis on DevOps and open source projects.
metadata.og:description: The latest news and resources on cloud native technologies, distributed systems and data architectures with emphasis on DevOps and open source projects.
metadata.og:title: Home

<script>
(function() {
	try {
		/// Ensure dataLayer exists
		window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];

		/// Preserve original push
		var originalPush = window.dataLayer.push.bind(window.dataLayer);
		var tnsCategories = '';

		function readCookie(key) {
			try {
				/// Prefer site utility if available
				if (window.tns && typeof window.tns.getCookie === 'function') {
					return window.tns.getCookie(key);
				}
				/// Fallback cookie read
				var match = document.cookie
					.split('; ')
					.find(function(row) { return row.indexOf(key + '=') === 0; });
				return match ? match.split('=')[1] : undefined;
			} catch (e) {
				return undefined;
			}
		}

		function attachUserIdToItem(item) {
			try {
				if (item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item)) {
					var uid = readCookie('tns-user-id');
					if (uid && item.user_id == null) {
						item.user_id = uid;
					}
				}
			} catch (e) {
				/// noop
			}
			return item;
		}

		function attachCategoriesToItem(item) {
			try {
				if (item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item)) {
					if (tnsCategories && item.categories == null) {
						item.categories = tnsCategories;
					}
				}
			} catch (e) {
				/// noop
			}
			return item;
		}

		/// Wrap dataLayer.push to auto-attach user_id and categories when available
		window.dataLayer.push = function() {
			var args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
			for (var i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
				args[i] = attachCategoriesToItem(attachUserIdToItem(args[i]));
			}
			return originalPush.apply(window.dataLayer, args);
		};

		/// Push current user_id state early so GTM variables can read it
		function pushUserIdState() {
			var uid = readCookie('tns-user-id');
			if (uid) {
				/// Use originalPush to avoid re-wrapping
				originalPush({ user_id: uid });
			}
		}

		/// Attempt immediately and on DOMContentLoaded
		pushUserIdState();
		if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
			document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', pushUserIdState);
		}
	} catch (err) {
		/// Fail closed: never block the page or GTM
		// console.warn('[TNS] dataLayer user_id wrapper error', err);
	}
})();

	<script>
		const adSettings = {"page_number":1,"page_type":"homepage","environment":"production"};

		const AdManager = {
	init: function() {
		window.googletag = window.googletag || { cmd: [] };
		this.load();
	},

	sanitize: function (value = '') {
		return String(value)
			.trim()
			// Remove characters forbidden at https://support.google.com/admanager/answer/10020177.
			.replace(/'|\\|'|=|!|#|\*|~|;|\^|\(|\)|<|>|\[|\]|,|&/g, '')
			// Extra spaces aren't forbidden, but rarely desired.
			.replace(/\s+/, ' ')
			// The + sign is also forbidden, but is being replaced with 'and' instead.
			.replace('+', 'and')
			// Maximum length of 40 for values.
			.substring(0, 40);
	},

	sanitizeTargetingValue: function (value = '') {
		if (Array.isArray(value)) {
			return value.map(this.sanitize);
		} else {
			return this.sanitize(value);
		}
	},

	load: function() {
		const slots = {
			'rootAdUnit' : '/22873384501/tns/',
			'homepage' : [
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-inline-1',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_inline_1',
				// 	'position': 'inline_1',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-inline-2',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_inline_2',
				// 	'position': 'inline_2',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-1',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_1',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_1',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-2',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_2',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_2',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-3',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_3',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_3',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-4',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_4',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_4',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-5',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_5',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_5',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-6',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_6',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_6',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-7',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_7',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_7',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-8',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_8',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_8',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-9',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_9',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_9',
				// },
				// {
				// 	'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-10',
				// 	'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_10',
				// 	'position': 'sidebar_10',
				// },
			],
			'post': [
				{
					'adSlot': 'div-gpt-ad-native-sidebar-1',
					'adUnit': 'native_sidebar_1',
					'position': 'sidebar_1',
				},
			]
		};

		googletag.cmd.push(() => {
			// Configure all ad slots on the page to be expanded by default, but
			// collapse slots that are unable to be filled with an ad.
			googletag.pubads().collapseEmptyDivs();

			googletag
				.defineSlot('/22873384501/tns/native_top', ['fluid'], 'div-gpt-ad-native-top')
				.setTargeting('position ', 'top')
				.addService(googletag.pubads());
			googletag
				.defineSlot('/22873384501/tns/native_bottom', ['fluid'], 'div-gpt-ad-native-bottom')
				.setTargeting('position ', 'bottom')
				.addService(googletag.pubads());

			// Define ad slots.
			if (1 === parseInt(adSettings.page_number)) {
				if (typeof slots[adSettings['page_type']] !== 'undefined') {
					for (let slot of slots[adSettings['page_type']]) {
						googletag
							.defineSlot(slots.rootAdUnit + slot.adUnit, ['fluid'], slot.adSlot)
							.setTargeting('position ', slot.position)
							.addService(googletag.pubads());
					}
				}
			} else if (adSettings.page_type === 'homepage' || adSettings.page_type === 'post') {
				for (let i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
					googletag
						.defineSlot('/22873384501/tns/native_inline_'+i, ['fluid'], 'div-gpt-ad-native-inline-'+i)
						.setTargeting('position', 'inline_'+i)
						.addService(googletag.pubads());
				}
			}

			// Set targeting for all ad slots on the page.
			for (let key in adSettings) {
				if (adSettings.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
					googletag.pubads().setTargeting(key, this.sanitizeTargetingValue( adSettings[key] ));
				}
			}

			googletag.pubads().addEventListener('slotRenderEnded', function (e) {
				if (!e.isEmpty) {
					return;
				}
				const slotId = e.slot.getSlotElementId();
				if (slotId.includes('inline')) {
					// Remove inline ad containers on the homepage from the DOM
					// to prevent the nth-selector styling from being thrown off
					//  by the hidden ad container.
					const slot = document.getElementById(slotId);
					if (!slot) {
						return;
					}
					slot.parentNode.removeChild(slot);
				}

				// The page layout shuffling on desktop article is causing the
				// ad code to have trouble creating the empty iframe, so the
				// ad slot is not getting collapsed. After a small delay,
				// manually collapse the slot.
				setTimeout(() => {
					const adContainer = document.getElementById(slotId);
					if (adContainer) {
						adContainer.style.display = 'none';
					}
				}, 1800)
			});

			googletag.pubads().addEventListener('slotOnload', (event) => {
				// - Native ads have a small chance of having the iframe within
				//   them set to have a height of 0.
				// - After the ad signals that it has loaded, check whether its
				//   iframe's height is very small.
				// - If it is, assume an error has happened and change the height
				//   to be the same as the container.

				const slot = event.slot;
				if (!slot) return;

				setTimeout(() => {
					const id = slot.getSlotElementId();

					const container = document.getElementById(id);
					if (!container) return;

					let iframe = container.querySelector('iframe');
					if (!iframe) return;

					let iframeHeight = iframe.offsetHeight;
					// Pick 10 instead of 0 just in case a border or something
					// similar has made the iframe register as having a few
					// pixels.
					if (iframeHeight > 10) return;
					else {
						window.dataLayer.push({
							'event' : 'gam_ad_unit_blank',
							'context' : id
						});
					}

					// Determine the height reserved by the ad container due to
					// the page's styling, minus the vertical padding.
					const containerStyle = getComputedStyle(container);
					let reservedSpace = parseFloat(containerStyle.height) - parseFloat(containerStyle.paddingTop) - parseFloat(containerStyle.paddingBottom);
					if (reservedSpace < 1) return;

					iframe.style.height = reservedSpace + 'px';
					iframe.style.minWidth = "100%";
				}, 1200)

			});

			// Enable SRA and services.
			googletag.pubads().enableSingleRequest();
			googletag.pubads().enableLazyLoad();
			googletag.enableServices();
		});
	},
};

window.AdManager = AdManager;

AdManager.init();

		(function () {
	let nativeAds = [];

	/**
	 * Determine the current breakpoint.
	 *
	 * The native ad will set a CSS class on the ad's body tag based on the
	 * breakpoint returned here. If you return "large" then the class
	 * "breakpoint-large" will be set on the native ad.
	 *
	 * @returns string The name of the current breakpoint.
	 */
	function getBreakpoint() {
		const width = window.innerWidth || document.body.clientWidth;
		// Customize these breakpoints to match your site. They can be anything
		// you want, so long as you style the native ad matching the classname
		// `breakpoint-${thisReturnValue}`.
		if (width >= 1400) {
			return 'x-large';
		} else if (width >= 1024) {
			return 'large';
		} else if (width >= 768) {
			return 'medium';
		} else {
			return 'small';
		}
	}

	/**
	 * Tell an iframe the current breakpoint using postMessage.
	 *
	 * @param {object} iframe An iframe's window object.
	 */
	function sendSize(iframe) {
		const msg = `breakpoint:${getBreakpoint()}`;
		iframe.postMessage(msg, '*');
	}

	/**
	 * Send the current breakpoint size to all native ads that have loaded.
	 */
	function notifyAllNativeAds() {
		if (!nativeAds || nativeAds.length === 0) {
			return;
		}

		nativeAds.forEach((nativeAd) => {
			sendSize(nativeAd);
		});
	}

	/**
	 * Initialize the necessary event listeners.
	 */
	function init() {
		// The Native Ad has loaded. Immediately tell it the current breakpoint,
		// and store it in an array so we can communicate it later if the browser
		// resizes.
		window.addEventListener(
			'message',
			function (e) {
				if (e.data === 'initdfp') {
					sendSize(e.source);
					nativeAds.push(e.source);
				}
			}
		);

		// Send an updated breakpoint to all native ads that have previously
		// loaded on the page.
		window.addEventListener(
			'resize',
			notifyAllNativeAds,
			{
				passive: true,
			}
		);
	}

	init();
})();

		<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		var utm_overrides = {};
		utm_overrides.utm_source = '';
		utm_overrides.utm_medium = '';
		utm_overrides.utm_content = '';
		utm_overrides.utm_campaign = '';

		window.appendUTM = function(url, utm_content, UTMnone) {
			if (UTMnone) {
				return url;
			}

			if (url.includes('mailto:')) {
				return url;
			}

			url = new URL(url);

			var hasUTM_source = url.searchParams.has('utm_source');
			var hasUTM_medium = url.searchParams.has('utm_medium');
			var hasUTM_content = url.searchParams.has('utm_content');
			var hasUTM_campaign = url.searchParams.has('utm_campaign');

			if (hasUTM_source && hasUTM_medium && hasUTM_content && hasUTM_campaign) {
				return url.href;
			}

			var newURL = '';
			newURL = url.origin;
			newURL += url.pathname;

			if (url.search) {
				newURL += url.search;
			}

			if (!hasUTM_source) {
				var source = 'the+new+stack';

				if (utm_overrides.utm_source) {
					source = utm_overrides.utm_source;
				}

				if (newURL.includes('?')) {
					newURL += '&utm_source=' + source;
				} else {
					newURL += '?utm_source=' + source;
				}
			}

			if (!hasUTM_medium) {
				var medium = 'referral';

				if (utm_overrides.utm_medium) {
					medium = utm_overrides.utm_medium;
				}

				if (newURL.includes('?')) {
					newURL += '&utm_medium=' + medium;
				} else {
					newURL += '?utm_medium=' + medium;
				}
			}

			if (!hasUTM_content && utm_content) {
				var content = utm_content;

				if (utm_overrides.utm_content) {
					content = utm_overrides.utm_content;
				}

				if (newURL.includes('?')) {
					newURL += '&utm_content=' + content;
				} else {
					newURL += '?utm_content=' + content;
				}
			}

			if (!hasUTM_campaign) {
				var campaign = 'tns+platform';

				if (utm_overrides.utm_campaign) {
					campaign = utm_overrides.utm_campaign;
				}

				if (newURL.includes('?')) {
					newURL += '&utm_campaign=' + campaign
				} else {
					newURL += '?utm_campaign=' + campaign
				}
			}

			if (url.hash) {
				newURL += url.hash;
			}

			return newURL;
		}
	});
</script>

		<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		window.tns = window.tns || {}

		window.tns.getUTMParameterValue = function(name) {
			const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)
			return urlParams.get(name)
		}

		window.tns.setCookie = function(key, value, hours_expiry) {
			const expiry_date = new Date()
			expiry_date.setTime(expiry_date.getTime() + hours_expiry * 60 * 60 * 1000)
			document.cookie = `${key}=${value};expires=${expiry_date.toUTCString()};samesite=lax;path=/;secure`
		}

		window.tns.getCookie = function(key) {
			return document.cookie
				.split('; ')
				.find((row) => row.startsWith(`${key}=`))
				?.split('=')[1]
		}
	})
</script>		<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		window.tns.newsletter = {
			signup : function(params, callback) {
				var context = params.context;
				var newsletterID = params.newsletterID;
				var email = params.email;
				var emailInput = params.emailInput;

				var newsletterTitle = '';
				var newsletterSlug = '';
				// var tnsDailyID = '6166149401';
				// var tnsWeeklyID = 'd60fc24015';
				if (newsletterID === '6166149401') {
					newsletterTitle = 'TNS Daily';
					newsletterSlug = 'tns-daily';
				}

				if (newsletterID === 'd60fc24015') {
					newsletterTitle = 'TNS Update';
					newsletterSlug = 'tns-update';
				}

				var data = null;

				async.series([
					validate,
					subscribe,
					handleError,
					confirmation
				], function(result) {
					console.log(result.message);
					if (callback) return callback(result);
				});

				function validate(next) {
					if (!email || !validator.isEmail(email)) {
						emailInput.addClass('error');

						return next({
							error : true,
							message : 'NEWSLETTER SIGNUP: Halting, invalid email.'
						});
					}

					return next();
				}

				function subscribe(next) {
					$.post('/no-cache/newsletter-subscribe/', {
						email : email,
						subscriptions : [
							newsletterID
						]
					}, function(result) {
						data = JSON.parse(result);

						window.dataLayer.push({
							'event' : 'newsletter_subscription',
							'newsletter' : newsletterSlug,
							'context' : context
						});

						return next();
					});
				}

				function handleError(next) {
					/// New sign-up
					if (!data.member) return next();

					/// Previously unsubscribed
					if (data.member.status === 'unsubscribed') {
						window.tns.modal.open({
							title : 'PLEASE RESUBSCRIBE',
							content : 'You have previously unsubcribed from ' + newsletterTitle + '. In order to resubscribe please click OK to open the resubscription form.'
						});

						$('.tns-modal-button-okay').off();
						$('.tns-modal-button-okay').on('click', function() {
							location.href = 'https://eepurl.com/bMg5kH';
						});

						emailInput.val('');

						return next({
							error : true,
							message : 'NEWSLETTER SIGNUP: Halting, member previously unsubscribed.'
						});
					}

					return next();
				}

				function confirmation(next) {
					var msg = '';

					if (data.audience.title === 'Member Exists') {
						msg = 'You have been successfully subscribed to the ' + newsletterTitle + ' newsletter.';
					} else {
						msg = 'You have been successfully subscribed to the ' + newsletterTitle + ' newsletter. Please check your inbox for an email confirmation link.';
					}

					window.tns.modal.open({
						title : '200 OK',
						content : msg
					});

					emailInput.val('');

					$('.tns-modal-button-okay').off();
					$('.tns-modal-button-okay').on('click', function() {
						window.tns.modal.close();
					});

					return next({
						error : false,
						message : 'NEWSLETTER SIGNUP: Newsletter subscription complete.'
					});
				}
			}
		}
	});
</script>		<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		window.tns = window.tns || {}
		
		window.tns.user = {
			_userPseudoId: null,
			_storageKey: 'tns-user-pseudo-id',
			_storageExpiry: 'tns-user-pseudo-id-expiry',
			
			generateUserPseudoId: function() {
				var uuid;
				
				// Try modern crypto.randomUUID first
				if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && crypto.randomUUID) {
					uuid = crypto.randomUUID();
					console.log('[TNS User] Generated userPseudoId using crypto.randomUUID()');
				} else {
					// Fallback UUID v4 generation
					uuid = 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function(c) {
						var r = Math.random() * 16 | 0;
						var v = c == 'x' ? r : (r & 0x3 | 0x8);
						return v.toString(16);
					});
					console.log('[TNS User] Generated userPseudoId using fallback method');
				}
				
				var userPseudoId = 'tns-' + uuid;
				console.log('[TNS User] New userPseudoId created:', userPseudoId);
				return userPseudoId;
			},
			
			setUserPseudoId: function(id, persistDays) {
				if (!id) return false;
				
				persistDays = persistDays || 365;
				this._userPseudoId = id;
				
				var expiryDate = new Date();
				expiryDate.setTime(expiryDate.getTime() + (persistDays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
				var expiryTimestamp = expiryDate.getTime();
				
				// Try localStorage first
				if (this._isStorageAvailable('localStorage')) {
					try {
						localStorage.setItem(this._storageKey, id);
						localStorage.setItem(this._storageExpiry, expiryTimestamp.toString());
						console.log('[TNS User] userPseudoId stored in localStorage:', id);
						return true;
					} catch (e) {
						console.warn('[TNS User] localStorage failed, trying sessionStorage');
					}
				}
				
				// Try sessionStorage fallback
				if (this._isStorageAvailable('sessionStorage')) {
					try {
						sessionStorage.setItem(this._storageKey, id);
						sessionStorage.setItem(this._storageExpiry, expiryTimestamp.toString());
						console.log('[TNS User] userPseudoId stored in sessionStorage:', id);
						return true;
					} catch (e) {
						console.warn('[TNS User] sessionStorage failed, trying cookies');
					}
				}
				
				// Cookie fallback using existing TNS cookie utility
				if (window.tns.setCookie) {
					var hoursExpiry = persistDays * 24;
					window.tns.setCookie(this._storageKey, id, hoursExpiry);
					window.tns.setCookie(this._storageExpiry, expiryTimestamp.toString(), hoursExpiry);
					console.log('[TNS User] userPseudoId stored in cookies:', id);
					return true;
				}
				
				// If all storage methods fail, keep in memory for session
				console.warn('[TNS User] All storage methods failed, userPseudoId will only persist for this session');
				return false;
			},
			
			getUserPseudoId: function() {
				// Return cached version if available
				if (this._userPseudoId) {
					console.log('[TNS User] Returning cached userPseudoId:', this._userPseudoId);
					return this._userPseudoId;
				}
				
				var storedId = null;
				var storedExpiry = null;
				
				// Try localStorage first
				if (this._isStorageAvailable('localStorage')) {
					try {
						storedId = localStorage.getItem(this._storageKey);
						storedExpiry = localStorage.getItem(this._storageExpiry);
					} catch (e) {
						// localStorage access failed
					}
				}
				
				// Try sessionStorage if localStorage didn't work
				if (!storedId && this._isStorageAvailable('sessionStorage')) {
					try {
						storedId = sessionStorage.getItem(this._storageKey);
						storedExpiry = sessionStorage.getItem(this._storageExpiry);
					} catch (e) {
						// sessionStorage access failed
					}
				}
				
				// Try cookies if both storage methods failed
				if (!storedId && window.tns.getCookie) {
					storedId = window.tns.getCookie(this._storageKey);
					storedExpiry = window.tns.getCookie(this._storageExpiry);
				}
				
				// Check if stored ID is expired
				if (storedId && storedExpiry) {
					var expiryTime = parseInt(storedExpiry);
					var currentTime = new Date().getTime();
					
					if (currentTime > expiryTime) {
						// ID is expired, clean up and generate new one
						console.log('[TNS User] userPseudoId expired, generating new one. Expired ID:', storedId);
						this._cleanupExpiredId();
						storedId = null;
					} else {
						console.log('[TNS User] Retrieved valid stored userPseudoId:', storedId);
					}
				}
				
				// If no valid stored ID, generate a new one
				if (!storedId) {
					console.log('[TNS User] No valid stored userPseudoId found, generating new one');
					storedId = this.generateUserPseudoId();
					this.setUserPseudoId(storedId);
				}
				
				// Cache for future calls
				this._userPseudoId = storedId;
				console.log('[TNS User] userPseudoId ready for use:', storedId);
				return storedId;
			},
			
			_isStorageAvailable: function(type) {
				var storage;
				try {
					storage = window[type];
					var x = '__storage_test__';
					storage.setItem(x, x);
					storage.removeItem(x);
					return true;
				} catch (e) {
					return e instanceof DOMException && (
						// everything except Firefox
						e.code === 22 ||
						// Firefox
						e.code === 1014 ||
						// test name field too, because code might not be present
						// everything except Firefox
						e.name === 'QuotaExceededError' ||
						// Firefox
						e.name === 'NS_ERROR_DOM_QUOTA_REACHED') &&
						// acknowledge QuotaExceededError only if there's something already stored
						(storage && storage.length !== 0);
				}
			},
			
			_cleanupExpiredId: function() {
				// Clean up from localStorage
				if (this._isStorageAvailable('localStorage')) {
					try {
						localStorage.removeItem(this._storageKey);
						localStorage.removeItem(this._storageExpiry);
					} catch (e) {
						// Cleanup failed
					}
				}
				
				// Clean up from sessionStorage
				if (this._isStorageAvailable('sessionStorage')) {
					try {
						sessionStorage.removeItem(this._storageKey);
						sessionStorage.removeItem(this._storageExpiry);
					} catch (e) {
						// Cleanup failed
					}
				}
				
				// Clean up cookies
				if (window.tns.setCookie) {
					window.tns.setCookie(this._storageKey, '', -1);
					window.tns.setCookie(this._storageExpiry, '', -1);
				}
				
				// Clear cached version
				this._userPseudoId = null;
			}
		}
	})

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		$modalScreen = $('#tns-modal-screen');
		$modal = $('#tns-modal');
		
		window.tns.modal = {
			open : function(params) {
				$('.tns-modal-title').html(params.title);
				$('.tns-modal-content').html(params.content);

				$modalScreen.stop().css({
					opacity : 0,
					display : 'block'
				});

				$modalScreen.stop().transition({
					duration : 333,
					opacity : 1,
					easing : 'ease-out-quad'
				});

				$modal.stop().css({
					opacity : 0,
					display : 'block'
				});

				$modal.stop().transition({
					duration : 333,
					opacity : 1,
					easing : 'ease-out-quad'
				});
			},
			close : function() {
				$modalScreen.stop().css({
					opacity : 0,
					display : 'block'
				});

				$modal.stop().transition({
					duration : 333,
					opacity : 0,
					easing : 'ease-out-quad'
				});

				$modalScreen.stop().transition({
					duration : 333,
					opacity : 0,
					easing : 'ease-out-quad'
				}, function() {
					$modalScreen.stop().css({
						opacity : 0,
						display : 'none'
					});

					$('.tns-modal-title').html('');
					$('.tns-modal-content').html('');
				});
			}
		}

		$('.tns-modal-close').on('click', function() {
			window.tns.modal.close();
		});
	});
</script>

							C304.633,235.518,310,215.863,310,181.835v-53.669C310,98.471,309.159,78.006,297.917,64.645z M199.021,162.41l-65.038,33.991

							c0-3.492,1.822-6.732,4.808-8.546c2.987-1.814,6.702-1.938,9.801-0.328l65.038,33.772c3.309,1.718,5.387,5.134,5.392,8.861

		$(document).ready(function() {
			var $follow_links = $('.tns-follow-links[data-instanceid="69b9bc95764a7"]');
			var categories = $follow_links.data('categories');

			$follow_links.find('.follow-icon').on('click', function() {
				var context = window.location.pathname;
				var platform = $(this).data('platform');
				var position = $(this).data('position');

				var payload = {
					'event' : 'follow_link_click',
					'platform' : platform,
					'context' : context,
					'position' : position
				};

				if (categories) {
					payload.categories = categories;
				}

				window.dataLayer.push(payload);
			});
		});
	</script>

									first TNS newsletter.

			<div class="row footer">
				<div class="col col-33 swiper-button-col">
					<div class="swiper-button tns-subscribe-swiper-button-prev">PREV</div>
				</div>
				<div class="col col-33 page-indicator">
					<span class="subscribe-current-slide">1</span> of <span class="subscribe-total-slides">2</span>
				</div>
				<div class="col col-33 swiper-button-col">
					<div class="swiper-button tns-subscribe-swiper-button-next">NEXT</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>

	<script>
		$(document).ready(function() {
			var subscribeCategories = '';
			var $subscribe = $('#tns-subscribe');
			var $modal = $subscribe.find('.modal');
			var $header = $modal.find('.header');
			var $close = $modal.find('.close');
			var $content = $modal.find('.content');
			var $footer = $modal.find('.footer');
			var $subscribe_button = $modal.find('.subscribe-button');

			/// Init Swiper
			var $subscribe_swiper = new Swiper('.tns-subscribe-swiper', {
				allowTouchMove: false,
				loop: false,
				slidesPerView: 1,
				autoplay: false,
				spaceBetween: 0,
				navigation : false,
				observer : true,
				preventInteractionOnTransition: true,
				a11y: false,
				noSwipingSelector: 'button'
			});

			/// Init window.tns.subscribe
			window.tns = window.tns || {}
			window.tns.subscribe = {
				prepop : false,
				section : '',
				context : '',
				screen : 0,
				open : function() {
					/// Reset the modal
					window.tns.subscribe.screen = 0;
					$subscribe_swiper.slideTo(0, 0, true);

					$('.form-field-resubscribe').hide();
					$('.copy-screen-0').show();
					$('.form-field-email').show();

					$('.swiper-slide').scrollTop(0);

					/// Open the modal
					$('body').css({
						overflow : 'hidden'
					});

					$subscribe.stop().css({
						display : 'block',
						opacity : 0
					});

					$subscribe.stop().transition({
						opacity : 1,
						duration : 333,
						easing : 'snap'
					});

					$modal.stop().css({
						opacity : 0,
						display : 'block'
					})

					$modal.stop().transition({
						delay : 333,
						duration : 121,
						opacity : 1,
						easing : 'easeOutQuad'
					});

					if (window.tns.subscribe.prepop === true) {
						$subscribe_button.click();
					}
				},
				close : function() {
					window.tns.subscribe.screen = 0;

					$subscribe.stop().css({
						opacity : 0,
						display : 'block'
					});

					$modal.stop().transition({
						duration : 333,
						opacity : 0,
						easing : 'easeOutQuad'
					});

					$subscribe.stop().transition({
						duration : 333,
						opacity : 0,
						easing : 'easeOutQuad'
					}, function() {
						$subscribe.stop().css({
							opacity : 0,
							display : 'none'
						});

						$('body').css({
							overflowY : 'auto'
						});

						$('.tns-subscribe-swiper-button-next').text('NEXT');

						$modal.stop().transition({
							maxHeight : 370,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$content.stop().transition({
							bottom : 0,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$footer.stop().transition({
							bottom : -60,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});
					});
				},
				submit : async function(direction) {
					/// Track the step completed
					var action_taken = '';

					/// Init the payload object
					var payload = {
						recaptcha_token : '',
						section : window.tns.subscribe.section,
						screen : null,
						data : {
							EMAIL : '',
							FNAME : '',
							LNAME : '',
							COMPANY : '',
							COUNTRY : '',
							ZIPCODE : '',
							JOBLEVEL : '',
							JOBROLE : '',
							ORGEMP : '',
							ORGDESC : '',
							ORGINDUS : '',
							LINKPROURL : ''
						},
						errors : []
					};

					/// Determine the target_screen
					var screen = window.tns.subscribe.screen;
					payload.screen = window.tns.subscribe.screen;
					console.log('[TNS Subscribe]', payload);

					var target_screen = window.tns.subscribe.screen;
					
					if (direction === 'prev') {
						target_screen = screen - 1;
					}

					if (direction === 'next') {
						target_screen = screen + 1;
					}

					/// Gather the values from the form
					$('.subscribe-input').each(function() {
						var key = $(this).data('key');
						var value = $(this).val();

						payload.data[key] = value;
					});

					/// Validate the values for the current screen
					if (screen === 0) {
						action_taken = 'newsletter_subscribe';

						if (!payload.data.EMAIL || !validator.isEmail(payload.data.EMAIL)) {
							payload.errors.push({
								key : 'EMAIL',
								msg : 'EMAIL is required.'
							});
						}
					}

					if (screen === 1) {
						action_taken = 'demo_data_1';

						var required = [
							'FNAME',
							'LNAME',
							'COMPANY',
							'COUNTRY'
						]

						required.map((key) => {
							if (!payload.data[key]) {
								payload.errors.push({
									key : key,
									msg : key + ' is required.'
								})	
							}
						});

						if (payload.data.COUNTRY === 'US' && !payload.data.ZIPCODE) {
							payload.errors.push({
								key : 'ZIPCODE',
								msg : 'ZIPCODE is required.'
							})
						}
					}

					if (screen === 2) {
						action_taken = 'demo_data_2';

						var required = [
							'JOBLEVEL',
							'JOBROLE',
							'ORGEMP',
							'ORGDESC',
							'ORGINDUS',
							// 'LINKPROURL'
						]

						if (payload.data.ORGEMP === 'not-working') {
							/// Remove ORGDESC and ORGINDUS from the required array
							required = required.filter(function(item) {
								return item !== 'ORGDESC' && item !== 'ORGINDUS'
							})
						}

						required.map((key) => {
							if (!payload.data[key]) {
								payload.errors.push({
									key : key,
									msg : key + ' is required.'
								})	
							}
						});

						if (payload.data.JOBLEVEL === 'other') {
							var other_value = $('.subscribe-job-level-other').val();

							if (!other_value) {
								payload.errors.push({
									key : 'JOBLEVEL',
									msg : 'JOBLEVEL is required.'
								})
							} else {
								payload.data.JOBLEVEL = other_value;
							}
						}

						if (payload.data.JOBROLE === 'other') {
							var other_value = $('.subscribe-job-role-other').val();

							if (!other_value) {
								payload.errors.push({
									key : 'JOBROLE',
									msg : 'JOBROLE is required.'
								})
							} else {
								payload.data.JOBROLE = other_value;
							}
						}

						if (payload.data.ORGDESC === 'other') {
							var other_value = $('.subscribe-organization-description-other').val();

							if (!other_value) {
								payload.errors.push({
									key : 'ORGDESC',
									msg : 'ORGDESC is required.'
								})
							} else {
								payload.data.ORGDESC = other_value;
							}
						}

						if (payload.data.ORGINDUS === 'other') {
							var other_value = $('.subscribe-industry-other').val();

							if (!other_value) {
								payload.errors.push({
									key : 'ORGINDUS',
									msg : 'ORGINDUS is required.'
								})
							} else {
								payload.data.ORGINDUS = other_value;
							}
						}

						// if (!payload.data.LINKPROURL.includes('linkedin.com')) {
						// 	payload.errors.push({
						// 		key : 'LINKPROURL',
						// 		msg : 'LINKPROURL must be a linkedin.com url.'
						// 	})
						// }
					}

					if (direction === 'next' && payload.errors.length) {
						var $error_input = $('.subscribe-input[data-key="' + payload.errors[0].key + '"');
						$error_input.addClass('error').focus();
						$error_input.parent().find('.form-field-info').addClass('error');

						console.log('ERROR', payload);

						if (direction === 'next') {
							return payload;
						}
					}

					///
					/// POST /no-cache/subscribe/
					///

					if (direction === 'next') {
						payload.recaptcha_token = window.tns.turnstile.token;

						var result = await $.post('/no-cache/subscribe/', payload);
						result = JSON.parse(result);

						console.log('[TNS SUBSCRIBE]', result);

						if (result.errors.length) {
							console.log('[TNS SUBSCRIBE]', result.errors[0].msg);

							if (result.errors[0].msg == 'UNSUBSCRIBED') {
								window.tns.subscribe.resubscribe();
							}

							if (result.errors[0].msg == 'TURNSTILE_FAILED') {
								window.tns.subscribe.resubscribe();
							}

							return payload;
						}

						/// Re-enabled the subscribe button
						$('.subscribe-button').html('SUBSCRIBE')
						$('.subscribe-button').attr('disabled', false)

						var subscribePayload = {
							'event' : 'subscribe',
							'context' : window.tns.subscribe.context,
							'action_taken' : action_taken
						};

						if (subscribeCategories) {
							subscribePayload.categories = subscribeCategories;
						}

						window.dataLayer.push(subscribePayload);
					}

					/// Toggle the footer UI
					if (target_screen === 0) {
						$('.tns-subscribe-swiper-button-next').text('NEXT');

						$modal.stop().transition({
							maxHeight : 370,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$content.stop().transition({
							bottom : 0,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$footer.stop().transition({
							bottom : -60,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});
					}

					if (target_screen === 1) {
						$('.tns-subscribe-swiper-button-next').text('NEXT');

						$modal.stop().transition({
							maxHeight : 600,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$content.stop().transition({
							bottom : 60,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$footer.stop().transition({
							bottom : 0,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						setTimeout(function() {
							$('.subscribe-firstname').focus();
						}, 400);
					}

					if (target_screen === 2) {
						$('.tns-subscribe-swiper-button-next').text('SUBMIT');

						setTimeout(function() {
							$('.subscribe-job-level').focus();
						}, 400);
					}

					if (target_screen === 3) {
						$modal.stop().transition({
							maxHeight : 710,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$content.stop().transition({
							bottom : 0,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						$footer.stop().transition({
							bottom : -60,
							duration : 333,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});
					}

					/// Transition to the prev or next slide
					$subscribe_swiper.slideTo(target_screen, 333, true);
					window.tns.subscribe.screen = target_screen;
					$('.subscribe-current-slide').text(window.tns.subscribe.screen);
					$subscribe_button.attr('disabled', false);
				},
				resubscribe: function() {
					/// If a reader has previously unsubscribed they
					/// must use the Mailchimp hosted form to resubscribe

					/// Reset the UI to screen 0
					window.tns.subscribe.screen = 0;

					$subscribe_swiper.slideTo(0, 333, true);
					$('.tns-subscribe-swiper-button-next').text('NEXT');

					$modal.stop().transition({
						maxHeight : 370,
						duration : 333,
						easing : 'easeOutQuad'
					});

					$content.stop().transition({
						bottom : 0,
						duration : 333,
						easing : 'easeOutQuad'
					});

					$footer.stop().transition({
						bottom : -60,
						duration : 333,
						easing : 'easeOutQuad'
					});

					/// Hide the subscribe form and reset the button
					$('.copy-screen-0').hide();
					$('.form-field-email').hide();
					$('.subscribe-button').html('SUBSCRIBE')
					$('.subscribe-button').attr('disabled', false)

					/// Show the re-subscribe form
					$('.form-field-resubscribe').show();
					$('.resubscribe-button').off('click');
					$('.resubscribe-button').on('click', function($event) {
						window.open('http://eepurl.com/bMg5kH', '_blank');

						// DO NOT transition to the next slide
						// because they'll still be in "pending" mode
						// so we can't collect any data.

						// $modal.stop().transition({
						// 	maxHeight : 600,
						// 	duration : 333,
						// 	easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						// });

						// $content.stop().transition({
						// 	bottom : 60,
						// 	duration : 333,
						// 	easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						// });

						// $footer.stop().transition({
						// 	bottom : 0,
						// 	duration : 333,
						// 	easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						// });

						// setTimeout(function() {
						// 	$('.subscribe-firstname').focus();
						// }, 400);

						// $subscribe_swiper.slideTo(1, 333, true);
						// window.tns.subscribe.screen = 1;
					});
				}
			}

			/// Remove all error classes on keyup
			$('.subscribe-input').on('keyup', function($event) {
				if ($event.key === 'Enter') return;
				$('.subscribe-input').removeClass('error');
				$('.form-field-info').removeClass('error');
			});

			$('select.subscribe-input').on('change', function($event) {
				$('.subscribe-input').removeClass('error');
				$('.form-field-info').removeClass('error');
			});

			/// Handle .subscibe-button click
			$subscribe_button.on('click', function($event) {
				var disabled = $(this).attr('disabled')
				if (disabled) return false

				$('.subscribe-button').attr('disabled', true)
			    
			    /// Replace button label with spinner
				var spinner = $('<div class="button-spinner"></div>');
				$('.subscribe-button').html('').append(spinner);

				/// Refresh or obtain a turnstile token ...
				if (window.tns.turnstile.widgetId) {
					console.log('[TNS SUBSCRIBE] Resetting Turnstile widget: ' + window.tns.turnstile.widgetId)

					window.tns.turnstile.renderWidget(function(token) {
						window.tns.turnstile.token = token;

						console.log('[TNS SUBSCRIBE] Refreshed Turnstile token:')
						console.log(window.tns.turnstile.token)

						window.tns.subscribe.submit('next')
					});
				} else {
					console.log('[TNS SUBSCRIBE] Rendering Turnstile widget')

					/// Render the Turnstile widget and obtain a token and a widgetId
					window.tns.turnstile.renderWidget(async function(token) {
						window.tns.turnstile.token = token;

						console.log('[TNS SUBSCRIBE] Obtained Turnstile token:')
						console.log(window.tns.turnstile.token)

						window.tns.subscribe.submit('next')
					});
				}
			});

			/// Handle onEnter for subscribe-email input
			$('.subscribe-email').on('keyup', function($event) {
				if ($event.key === 'Enter') {
					$subscribe_button.click();
				}
			});

			/// Handle other input toggle
			$('.subscribe-has-other').on('change', function($event) {
				var value = $(this).val();
				var $other_input = $(this).next();
				var $other_clear = $(this).next().next();
				
				if (value === 'other') {
					$(this).blur().hide();

					$other_input.css({ display : 'block' });
					$other_clear.show();
					$other_input.focus();
				}
			});

			// $('.subscribe-input-other').on('blur', function() {
			// 	var value = $(this).val();

			// 	if (value === '') {
			// 		$(this).hide();
			// 		$(this).prev().css({ display : 'block' }).val('null');
			// 	}
			// });

			$('.subscribe-input-other-clear').on('click', function() {
				$(this).prev().val('');
				$(this).prev().hide();
				$(this).prev().prev().val('').show();
				$(this).hide();
			});

			/// Handle zipcode input toggle
			$('.subscribe-country').on('change', function($event) {
				var countryCode = $(this).val();

				if (countryCode === 'US') {
					$('.form-field-zipcode').show();
				} else {
					$('.form-field-zipcode').hide();
				}
			});

			/// Handle toggle of ORGDESC and ORGINDUS inputs
			$('.subscribe-employees').on('change', function($event) {
				var value = $(this).val();
				if (value === 'not-working') {
					$('.form-field-orgdesc').hide();
					$('.form-field-orgindus').hide();
				} else {
					$('.form-field-orgdesc').show();
					$('.form-field-orgindus').show();
				}
			});

			/// Handle PREV NEXT clicks
			$('.tns-subscribe-swiper-button-prev').on('click', function() {
				window.tns.subscribe.submit('prev');
			});

			$('.tns-subscribe-swiper-button-next').on('click', function() {
				window.tns.subscribe.submit('next');
			});

			/// Close/Cancel handlers
			$modal.on('click', function($event) {
				$event.stopPropagation();
			});

			$subscribe.on('click', function($event) {
				window.tns.subscribe.close();
			});

			$close.on('click', function($event) {
				$event.stopPropagation();

				window.tns.subscribe.close();
			});

			///
			/// Auto-open Subscribe based on the `open-subscribe` query param?
			///

			var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);

			if (urlParams.get('open-subscribe')) {
				window.tns.subscribe.open();
			}
		});
	</script>

				<div class="row context">

				<div class="row answers">

												<div
							class="option"
							data-questionid="66b25394b7070"

						>

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		/// Handle TNS Daily subscription
		var $poll = $('.tns-poll[data-instanceID="69b9bc95768d3"]');
		var $tnsNewsletterEmailInput = $poll.find('.tns-poll-postroll-daily-input');
		var $tnsNewsletterSubmitButton = $poll.find('.tns-poll-postroll-daily-button');

		$tnsNewsletterEmailInput.on('keyup', function($event) {
			$(this).removeClass('error');

			if ($event.which === 13) {
				$tnsNewsletterSubmitButton.click();
			}
		});

		$tnsNewsletterSubmitButton.on('click', function() {
			var email = $tnsNewsletterEmailInput.val();

			window.tns.subscribe.prepop = true;
			window.tns.subscribe.context = 'tns_voxpop_postroll';

			$('#tns-subscribe').find('.subscribe-email').val(email);
			$('#tns-subscribe').find('.subscribe-button').click();

			window.tns.subscribe.open();
		});
	});
</script>		</div>

	<script>
		$(document).ready(function() {
			var $poll = $('.tns-poll[data-instanceID="69b9bc95768d3"]');
			var $option = $poll.find('.option');
			var sponsor_slug = '';
			var voxpop = 'true'; /// string 'true' || 'false'
			var categories = $poll.data('categories');

			var voted = localStorage.getItem('tns_poll_vote_22754645');
			if (voted) voted = JSON.parse(voted);

			///
			/// Handle vote
			///

			$option.on('click', function($event) {
				var $thisOption = $(this);
				var poll_ID = '22754645';
				var instance_ID = '69b9bc95768d3';
				var question_ID = null;
				var answer_ID = null;
				var captchaToken = null;
				var pollData = null;

				if ($poll.hasClass('done')) return;

				async.series([
					setStatusClasses,
					obtainCaptchaToken,
					revealPercentages,
					submitVote,
					displayResults,
					handlePostroll
				], function(result) {
					if (result) console.log(result);
				});

				function setStatusClasses(next) {
					$poll.addClass('done');

					$option.removeClass('active');
					$thisOption.addClass('active');
					$thisOption.addClass('selected');

					question_ID = $thisOption.data('questionid');
					answer_ID = $thisOption.data('answerid');

					return next();
				}

				function obtainCaptchaToken(next) {
					captchaToken = window.tns.turnstile.token;

					return next();
				}

				function revealPercentages(next) {
					var delay = 21;
					var i = 0;

					$poll.find('.option-percentage').each(function() {
						$(this).transition({
							delay : delay * i,
							duration : 99,
							opacity : 1,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						});

						i++;
					});

					return next();
				}

				function submitVote(next) {
					var payload = {
						poll_ID : '22754645',
						instance_ID : instance_ID,
						question_ID : question_ID,
						answer_ID : answer_ID,
						recaptcha_token : captchaToken,
						sponsor : sponsor_slug
					}

					console.log('[tns-poll] Sending poll vote ...')

					$.ajax({
						url  : '/no-cache/polls-vote/',
						type : 'post',
						data : payload,
						statusCode : {
							429 : function() {
								$poll.removeClass('done');
								$option.removeClass('active');
								$poll.find('.option-percentage').css({
									opacity : 0
								});

								var poll_type = 'inline';
								if (voxpop === 'true') poll_type = 'voxpop';

								var event_payload = {
									event : 'poll',
									poll_action : 'rate-limited',
									poll_type : poll_type,
									poll_id : '22754645',
									question_ID : question_ID,
									answer_ID : answer_ID
								}

								if (sponsor_slug) {
									event_payload.sponsor = sponsor_slug;
								}

								if (categories) {
									event_payload.categories = categories;
								}

								window.dataLayer.push(event_payload)

								var msg = '429 — Whoa, facile tigré.';
								msg += 'You\'re being rate-limited.';
								msg += 'If you\'re human, take it easy and try again in an hour.';
								console.log(msg);
							}
						}
					}).done(function(data, statusText, xhr) {
						if (data) data = JSON.parse(data);
						pollData = data;

						console.log('[tns-poll] Result from vote endpoint:');
						console.log(data);

						/// Pre-construct the event_payload
						var poll_type = 'inline';
						if (voxpop === 'true') poll_type = 'voxpop';

						var event_payload = {
							event : 'poll',
							poll_action : null,
							poll_type : poll_type,
							poll_id : '22754645',
							question_ID : question_ID,
							answer_ID : answer_ID
						}

						if (sponsor_slug) {
							event_payload.sponsor = sponsor_slug;
						}

						if (categories) {
							event_payload.categories = categories;
						}

						if (data.bot === true) {
							event_payload.poll_action = 'recaptcha-fail';

							console.log('[tns-poll] Suspected bot vote due to recaptcha fail.');

							window.dataLayer.push(event_payload);

							event_payload.instance_ID = instance_ID;
							console.log(event_payload);

							return next();
						}

						if (!voted && data.unique_vote === true) {
							event_payload.poll_action = 'vote';

							console.log('[tns-poll] Unique vote detected, firing GA4 event.');

							window.dataLayer.push(event_payload);

							event_payload.instance_ID = instance_ID;
							console.log(event_payload);

							delete payload.recaptcha_token;
							localStorage.setItem('tns_poll_vote_22754645', JSON.stringify(payload));
							console.log('[tns-poll] Set localStorage item.');
						} else {
							event_payload.poll_action = 'duplicate-vote-attempt';

							console.log('[tns-poll] Detected duplicate vote, did not fire GA4 event.');

							event_payload.instance_ID = instance_ID;
							console.log(event_payload);

							delete payload.recaptcha_token;
							localStorage.setItem('tns_poll_vote_22754645', JSON.stringify(payload));
						}

						return next();
					});
				}

				function displayResults(next) {
					var highestPercentage = 0;
					var totalVotes = parseInt(pollData.totalVotes);
					var totalPercentage = 0;

					$option.each(function() {
						var optionAnswerID = $(this).data('answerid');
						var percentage = 0;

						pollData.results.map(result => {
							if (result.answer_ID === optionAnswerID) {
								percentage = parseInt(result.percentage);
								totalPercentage += percentage;

								if (percentage > highestPercentage) {
									highestPercentage = percentage;

									$option.removeClass('active');
									$(this).addClass('active');
								}
							}
						});

						var $resultsBar = $(this).find('.option-results');
						var $percentDisplay = $(this).find('.option-percentage');
						var digit = 0;

						var uptickPercentDisplay = setInterval(function() {
							if (digit >= percentage) {
								clearInterval(uptickPercentDisplay);
								return;
							}

							digit++;
							
							$percentDisplay.html(digit + '%');
						}, 3);

						if (percentage === 0) {
							$percentDisplay.html('0%');
						}

						$resultsBar.transition({
							width : percentage + '%',
							duration : 777,
							easing : 'easeOutQuad'
						})
					});

					return next();
				}

				function handlePostroll(next) {
					if (voxpop !== 'true') {
						console.log('[tns-poll] Inline poll detected, skipping post-roll ...');

						return next();
					}

					console.log('[tns-poll] Voxpop poll detected, firing post-roll ...');

					var targetHeight = $poll.find('.post-roll-block').outerHeight(true);

					$poll.find('.post-roll').transition({
						delay : 555,
						height : targetHeight,
						duration : 777,
						easing : 'easeOutQuad'
					});

					setTimeout(function() {
						$poll.find('.post-roll').addClass('open');

						if (window.tns.voxpop && window.tns.voxpop.vote) {
							window.tns.voxpop.vote(pollData, 777);
						}
					}, 777);
				}
			});

			///
			/// Handle firing the impression event, but only when
			/// the poll enters the viewport.
			///

			function isInViewport($element) {
				var elementTop = $element.offset().top;
				var elementBottom = elementTop + $element.outerHeight();
				var viewportTop = $(window).scrollTop();
				var viewportBottom = viewportTop + $(window).height();
				return elementBottom > viewportTop && elementTop < viewportBottom;
			};

			if (!voted && voxpop !== 'true') {
				var impression_recorded = false;

				$(window).scroll(function() {
					if (!impression_recorded && isInViewport($poll)) {
						var poll_type = 'inline';
						if (voxpop === 'true') poll_type = 'voxpop';

						var event_payload = {
							event : 'poll',
							poll_action : 'impression',
							poll_type : poll_type,
							poll_id : '22754645'
						}

						if (sponsor_slug) {
							event_payload.sponsor = sponsor_slug;
						}

						if (categories) {
							event_payload.categories = categories;
						}

						console.log('[Polls] Poll impression detected, firing GA4 event.');

						window.dataLayer.push(event_payload)

						event_payload.instance_ID = '69b9bc95768d3';
						console.log(event_payload);

						impression_recorded = true;
					}
				});
			}


			///
			/// Handle rendering the poll if this user has
			/// already voted in it. Display the results.
			///

			if (voted) {
				var renderResults = setInterval(function() {
					$option.each(function() {
						var answer_ID = $(this).data('answerid');
						if (answer_ID === voted.answer_ID) {
							$(this).click();
						}
					});

					clearInterval(renderResults);

					return false;
				}, 333);
			}


			///
			/// Poll Sponsor Click Tracking
			///

			$sponsorBlock = $poll.find('.poll-sponsor');

			$sponsorBlock.on('click', function() {
				var sponsorSlug = $(this).data('sponsor-slug');
				var url = $(this).attr('href');
				var poll_type = 'inline';
				if (voxpop === 'true') poll_type = 'voxpop';

				var event_payload = {
					event : 'sponsor_poll_click',
					sponsor : sponsor_slug,
					url : url,
					poll_type : poll_type,
					poll_id : '22754645'
				}

				if (categories) {
					event_payload.categories = categories;
				}

				window.dataLayer.push(event_payload);
			});
		});
	</script>
				</div>
		</div>

		</div>
	</div>
</div>

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		$voxpopScreen = $('.tns-voxpop-screen');
		$voxpopModal = $('.tns-voxpop-modal');

		var instance_ID = $voxpopModal.find('.tns-poll').data('instanceid');

		var sponsor_slug = '';

		var voted = localStorage.getItem('tns_poll_vote_22754645');
		if (voted) voted = JSON.parse(voted);

		$voxpopModal.on('click', function($event) {
			$event.stopPropagation();
		});

		window.tns.voxpop = {
			resize : function(delay) {
				var windowHeight = $(window).height();
				var headerHeight = $voxpopModal.find('.header').outerHeight(true);
				var contentHeight = $voxpopModal.find('.content-block').outerHeight();
				var footerHeight = $voxpopModal.find('.footer').outerHeight(true);
				var targetHeight = headerHeight + contentHeight + footerHeight;

				if (targetHeight >= windowHeight) {
					targetHeight = windowHeight - 40;
				}

				$voxpopModal.stop().transition({
					height : targetHeight,
					duration : delay || 333,
					easing : 'snap'
				});
			},
			open : function(params) {
				$('body').css({
					overflow : 'hidden'
				});

				$voxpopScreen.stop().css({
					opacity : 0,
					display : 'block'
				});

				$voxpopScreen.stop().transition({
					duration : 333,
					opacity : 1,
					easing : 'snap'
				});

				$voxpopModal.stop().css({
					opacity : 0,
					display : 'block'
				});

				window.tns.voxpop.resize();

				$voxpopModal.stop().transition({
					delay : 333,
					duration : 121,
					opacity : 1,
					easing : 'easeOutQuad'
				});

				///
				/// Record an impression event
				///

				if (!voted) {
					var event_payload = {
						poll_action : 'impression',
						poll_type : 'voxpop',
						poll_id : '22754645'
					}

					if (sponsor_slug) {
						event_payload.sponsor = sponsor_slug;
					}

					console.log('[Voxpop] Impression detected, firing GA4 event.');
					
					event_payload.event = 'poll';
					window.dataLayer.push(event_payload);

					event_payload.instance_ID = instance_ID;
					console.log(event_payload);
				}
			},
			vote : function(pollData, delay) {
				console.log('[Voxpop] Firing post-vote resize.');

				setTimeout(function() {
					window.tns.voxpop.resize(delay);
				}, 555);
			},
			close : function() {
				$voxpopScreen.stop().css({
					opacity : 0,
					display : 'block'
				});

				$voxpopModal.stop().transition({
					duration : 333,
					opacity : 0,
					easing : 'easeOutQuad'
				});

				$voxpopScreen.stop().transition({
					duration : 333,
					opacity : 0,
					easing : 'easeOutQuad'
				}, function() {
					$voxpopScreen.stop().css({
						opacity : 0,
						display : 'none'
					});

					$('body').css({
						overflowY : 'auto'
					});
				});
			}
		}

		$('.tns-voxpop-close').on('click', function() {
			window.tns.voxpop.close();
		});

		$('.tns-voxpop-screen').on('click', function() {
			window.tns.voxpop.close();
		});

		$(window).on('resize', function() {
			window.tns.voxpop.resize();
		});


		
		///
		/// Auto-open Voxpop based on the `open-voxpop` query param?
		///

		var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);

		if (urlParams.get('open-voxpop')) {
			window.tns.voxpop.open();
		}
	});
</script>

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		var categories = '';
		function toggleMobileNav() {
			if ($('.masthead-menu-icon').hasClass('active')) {
				$('.masthead-menu-icon').removeClass('active');
				$('#tns-header-masthead').removeClass('dark');

				$('.masthead-menu-close-icon').stop().transition({
					opacity : 0,
					duration : 0,
					easeing : 'snap'
				}, function() {
					$(this).css({ display : 'none' });
				});

				$('.masthead-menu-icon').stop().css({
					display : 'block'
				}).transition({
					opacity : 1,
					duration : 333,
					easeing : 'snap'
				});

				$('.masthead-search-icon').stop().css({
					display : 'block'
				}).transition({
					opacity : 1,
					duration : 121,
					easeing : 'snap'
				});

				var height = '60px';
				var paddingBottom = '0px';

				$('body').css({
					overflowX : 'hidden',
					overflowY : 'auto'
				});
			} else {
				$('.masthead-menu-icon').addClass('active');
				$('#tns-header-masthead').addClass('dark');

				$('.masthead-menu-icon').stop().transition({
					opacity : 0,
					duration : 0,
					easeing : 'snap'
				}, function() {
					$(this).css({ display : 'none' });
				});

				$('.masthead-search-icon').stop().transition({
					opacity : 0,
					duration : 333,
					easeing : 'snap'
				}, function() {
					$(this).css({ display : 'none' });
				});

				$('.masthead-menu-close-icon').stop().css({
					display : 'block'
				}).transition({
					opacity : 1,
					duration : 333,
					easeing : 'snap'
				});

				var height =  window.screen.height;
				var paddingBottom = '200px';

				$('body').css({
					overflowX : 'hidden',
					overflowY : 'hidden'
				});
			}

			$('.mobile-nav-dropdown').scrollTop(0);
			$('.mobile-nav-dropdown').stop().transition({
				height : height,
				paddingBottom : paddingBottom,
				duration : 222,
				easeing : 'snap'
			});
		}

		$('.masthead-menu-icon').on('click', function($event) {
			$event.preventDefault();

			var payload = {
				'event' : 'nav_click',
				'target' : 'mobile_nav'
			};

			if (categories) {
				payload.categories = categories;
			}

			window.dataLayer.push(payload);

			toggleMobileNav();
		});

		$('.masthead-menu-close-icon').on('click', function($event) {
			$event.preventDefault();

			toggleMobileNav();
		});
	});
</script>

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		///
		/// Stackie AI Flag
		///

		const key = 'stackie_pageviews'
		const expiryKey = 'stackie_pageviews_expiry'
		const expiryDuration = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 /// 24 hours
		const now = Date.now()

		let pageviews = 0
		let expiry = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(expiryKey), 10)

		/// Reset if expired or missing
		if (!expiry || now > expiry) {
			localStorage.setItem(key, '0')
			localStorage.setItem(expiryKey, (now + expiryDuration).toString())
		}

		/// Get and increment pageviews
		pageviews = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(key), 10) || 0
		pageviews++
		localStorage.setItem(key, pageviews.toString())

		/// Check path and apply animation
		const currentPath = window.location.pathname
		if (currentPath === '/search/') {
			/// Max out pageviews to 4 on /search/
			localStorage.setItem(key, '4')
		}

		/// Search Icon Click
		$('.masthead-search-icon').on('click', function($event) {
			$event.preventDefault();

			window.dataLayer.push({
				'event': 'nav_click',
				'target': 'search',
			});

			location.href = '/search/'
		});



		///
		/// Login/Logout Button Handling
		///

		/// Init Login Button Label
		var user = window.tns.getCookie('tns-user')
		if (user) {
			$('.masthead-login-button').text("")
		} else {
			$('.masthead-login-button').text("LOGIN")
		}

		/// Login Click
		$('.masthead-login-button').on('click', function($event) {
			$event.preventDefault()

			var label = $('.masthead-login-button').text().trim()

			if (label === 'LOGIN') {
				window.dataLayer.push({
					'event': 'nav_click',
					'target': 'login',
				})

				window.imgjs.subscribe.config.onClose = function(user) {
					if (user) {
						window.tns.setCookie('tns-user-id', user.author_id, 8400)
						window.tns.setCookie('tns-user', JSON.stringify(user), 8400)

						/// Update the BlueConic profile with the email and Ory ID
			            const profile = window.blueConicClient.profile.getProfile()
			            profile.setValue('email', user?.email)
			            profile.setValue('ory_id', user?.author_id)
			            window.blueConicClient.profile.updateProfile()

						$('.masthead-login-button').text("")

						/// Determine if it's a new subscription by testing
						/// if the createdAt date is today's date
						if (window.imgjs.subscribe.isNewSubscription(user.createdAt)) {
						    window.dataLayer.push({
				                'event' : 'user_registration',
				                'url' : window.location.href,
				                'channel': window.imgjs.subscribe.channel,
				                'channel_id': window.imgjs.subscribe.channel_id
				            })
						}
					} else {
						console.log('[IMG Subscribe] ERROR Failed to validate OTC')
						
						window.tns.setCookie('img-session-token', '', -1)
						window.tns.setCookie('tns-user-id', '', -1)
						window.tns.setCookie('tns-user', '', -1)
						$('.masthead-login-button').text("LOGIN")
					}
				}

				var subscriptions = {
					mc : [
						'6166149401' /// TNS Daily
					],
					hs : []
				}

				const hostname = window.location.hostname

				switch (true) {
					case hostname.includes("thenewstack.io"):
						subscriptions.hs.push("688810478") /// TNS Daily (PROD)
						break

					case hostname.includes("thenewstack.dev"):
						subscriptions.hs.push("860037297") /// TNS Daily (SANDBOX)
						break
				}

				window.imgjs.subscribe.channel = 'login_button'
				window.imgjs.subscribe.channel_id = 'login_button'
				window.imgjs.subscribe.open(null, subscriptions, 'login')
			}

			window.imgjs.subscribe.config.onProfileUpdate = function(data) {
				console.log("Set tns-user cookie with the following data:")
				console.log(data)

				if (data.user) {
					window.tns.setCookie('tns-user-id', data.user.author_id, 8400)
					window.tns.setCookie('tns-user', JSON.stringify(data.user), 8400)
				} else {
					console.error("[IMGJS] ERROR No user returned to onProfileUpdate")
				}
			}

			if (label === '') {
				window.dataLayer.push({
					'event': 'nav_click',
					'target': 'logout',
				})

				var url = 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.dev/api/accounts/logout'
				fetch(url, {
					method: 'POST',
					headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
					credentials: 'include'
				}).then(response => {
					if (!response.ok) {
						console.log(`Failed to logout`)
					}
				}).then(result => {
					window.tns.setCookie('tns-user-id', '', -1)
					window.tns.setCookie('tns-user', '', -1)

					$('.masthead-login-button').text("LOGIN")

					console.log(`Successfully logged-out`)
				}).catch(error => {
					console.error('Error:', error)
				})
			}
		})
	});
</script>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>

				'target' : target,
			};

			if (categories) {
				payload.categories = categories;
			}

			window.dataLayer.push(payload);
		});
	});

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		var lastScrollTop = 0;
		window.headerExpandOnScroll = true;

		window.headerCollapse = function() {
			$('.header-fixed').addClass('collapsed');

			if ($('.nav-topics-dropdown').hasClass('open')) {
				$('.topics-nav-block a').removeClass('active');
				$('.nav-topics-dropdown').removeClass('open');

				$('.nav-topics-dropdown').transition({
					height : 0,
					duration : 99,
					easeing : 'easeOutQuad'
				});
			}
		}

		window.headerExpand = function() {
			$('.header-fixed').removeClass('collapsed');

			if ($('.nav-topics-dropdown').hasClass('open')) {
				$('.topics-nav-block a').removeClass('active');
				$('.nav-topics-dropdown').removeClass('open');

				$('.nav-topics-dropdown').transition({
					height : 0,
					duration : 99,
					easeing : 'easeOutQuad'
				});
			}
		}

		$(window).scroll(function(event) {
			if (!window.headerExpandOnScroll) return;

			var scrollTop = $(window).scrollTop();
			if (scrollTop <= 50) return;

			/// Down (collapse)
			if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop) {
				window.headerCollapse();
			}

			/// Up (expand)
			if (scrollTop < lastScrollTop) {
				window.headerExpand();
			}

			lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
		});

		$(window).on('resize', function() {
			$('.topics-nav-block a').removeClass('active');
			$('.nav-topics-dropdown').removeClass('open');

			$('.nav-topics-dropdown').transition({
				height : 0,
				duration : 99,
				easeing : 'easeOutQuad'
			});
		});
	});
</script>

				github_login_url: 'https://img-api-v2.insightmediagroup.io/api/accounts/login/github',
				set_session_url: 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.dev/api/accounts/login/set-session'
			}

			if (hostname.includes('thenewstack.io')) {
				window.imgjs.subscribe.config.subscribe_url = 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.io/api/accounts/subscribe'
				window.imgjs.subscribe.config.login_url = 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.io/api/accounts/login/verify-otc-login'
				window.imgjs.subscribe.config.update_url = 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.io/api/accounts'
				window.imgjs.subscribe.config.read_url = 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.io/api/accounts/me'
				window.imgjs.subscribe.config.oauth = {
					google_login_url: 'https://img-api-v2.insightmediagroup.io/api/accounts/login/google',
					github_login_url: 'https://img-api-v2.insightmediagroup.io/api/accounts/login/github',
					set_session_url: 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.io/api/accounts/login/set-session'
				}
			}
		}

		window.imgjs.subscribe.resetConfig()

		/// Initialize IMGJS Reactions Config
		window.imgjs.reactions.resetConfig = function() {
			window.imgjs.reactions.config = {
				url: 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.dev/api/reactions'
			}

			var hostname = window.location.hostname
			if (hostname.includes('thenewstack.io')) {
				window.imgjs.reactions.config.url = 'https://img-api-v2.thenewstack.io/api/reactions'
			}
		}

		window.imgjs.reactions.resetConfig()

		window.imgjs.subscribe.isNewSubscription = function(createdAt) {
			if (!createdAt) return false;
			var d = createdAt instanceof Date ? createdAt : new Date(createdAt);
			if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return false;

			// Compare YYYY-MM-DD in UTC (GMT+0)
			var toYMD = function (date) { return date.toISOString().slice(0, 10); };
			return toYMD(d) === toYMD(new Date());
		}
	})
</script>

	<script>
		$(document).ready(function() {
			var $container = $('.tns-trending-stories-list-69b9bc95908a5');
			var context = $container.data('context');

			$container.load('/no-cache/trending-stories/', {
				limit : '5',
				category_slug : '',
				postID : '',
				context : 'frontpage'
			}, function(result) {
				if (context === 'frontpage') {
					$container.find('.trending-story-link').addClass('frontpage-link');
				}

				$('body').off('click.trending_story');
				$('body').on('click.trending_story', '.trending-story-link', function($event) {
					var title = $(this).attr('aria-label');
					var url = $(this).attr('href');
					url = url.replace('https://thenewstack.io', '');
					var context = $(this).data('context');
					var categories = $(this).data('categories');
					var payload = {
						'event' : 'trending_story_click',
						'post_title' : title,
						'url' : url,
						'context' : context
					};

					if (categories) {
						payload.categories = categories;
					}

					window.dataLayer.push(payload);
				});
			});
		});
	</script>

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		/// Randomize homepage sponsors
		function shuffleArray(array) {
			for (var i = array.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
				var j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
				var temp = array[i];
				array[i] = array[j];
				array[j] = temp;
			}
			return array;
		}

		var sponsors = shuffleArray($('.sponsors-logos-list').children());
		$('.sponsors-logos-list').empty();
		var maxSponsors = 5;
		var i = 1;

		$(sponsors).each(function() {
			if (i > maxSponsors) return;

			$('.sponsors-logos-list').append($(this));

			i++;
		});

		/// Record GA event for clicks
		$('.sponsor-logo a').on('click', function($event) {
			$event.preventDefault();

			var sponsor = $(this).data('sponsor-slug');
			var url = $(this).attr('href');

			url = window.appendUTM(url);

			window.dataLayer.push({
				'event' : 'sponsor_logo_click',
				'sponsor' : sponsor,
				'url' : url
			});

			window.open(url);
		});
	});
</script>

	<script>
		$(document).ready(function() {
			var $follow_links = $('.tns-follow-links[data-instanceid="69b9bc96ecf04"]');
			var categories = $follow_links.data('categories');

			$follow_links.find('.follow-icon').on('click', function() {
				var context = window.location.pathname;
				var platform = $(this).data('platform');
				var position = $(this).data('position');

				var payload = {
					'event' : 'follow_link_click',
					'platform' : platform,
					'context' : context,
					'position' : position
				};

				if (categories) {
					payload.categories = categories;
				}

				window.dataLayer.push(payload);
			});
		});
	</script>

		<script>
			$(document).ready(function() {
				$('#tns-footer a').on('click', function(event) {
					var href = $(this).attr('href');

					window.dataLayer.push({
						'event' : 'footer_link_click',
						'url' : href
					});
				})
			});

			function injectAds() {
				if (window.innerWidth >= 768 || ! document.body.classList.contains('single-post')) {
					return;
				}

				const paragraphsBetweenAds = 4;
				const maxAds = 1;

				const paragraphs = document.querySelectorAll('#tns-post-body-content > p');
				const paragraphCount = paragraphs.length;


				let count = 1;
				let position = paragraphsBetweenAds;
				let adCount = 0;

				while (position < paragraphCount && adCount < maxAds) {
					const myNode = paragraphs[position];

					const adContainer = document.createElement('div');
					adContainer.setAttribute('class', 'ad-container ad-container--inline');
					adContainer.setAttribute('id', `div-gpt-ad-native-inline-${count}`);

					myNode.insertAdjacentElement('beforebegin', adContainer);

					googletag
						.defineSlot('/22873384501/tns/native_inline_' + count, ['fluid'], 'div-gpt-ad-native-inline-' + count)
						.setTargeting('position', 'inline_' + count)
						.addService(googletag.pubads());
					googletag.display(`div-gpt-ad-native-inline-${count}`);

					adCount++;
					count += 1;
					position = count * paragraphsBetweenAds;
				}
			};

			googletag.cmd.push(function(){
				injectAds();
			});

			window.addEventListener('resize', function(event) {
				if ( document.getElementById('div-gpt-ad-native-inline-1') ) {
					return;
				}
				injectAds();
			}, true);
		</script>
